metadata.title: Why Not WordPress? The Advantages of a Custom Website
metadata.description: WordPress vs custom Next.js website: performance, security, SEO, design. Discover why a custom site surpasses WordPress for your business.
metadata.ogTitle: Why Not WordPress? The Advantages of a Custom Website
metadata.ogDescription: WordPress vs custom Next.js website: performance, security, SEO, design.

hero.title: Why Not WordPress?
hero.subtitle: WordPress dominates the web with 43% market share. But is it really the best choice for your professional website? Honest comparison.

sections.title: Performance: speed makes the difference
paragraphs: A WordPress site loads on average in 2 to 5 seconds, compared to less than one second for a custom Next.js site. This difference is crucial: 53% of mobile visitors leave a site that takes more than 3 seconds to load.

With Next.js, each page is pre-generated and served from a global CDN. No database to query, no plugins to load: the page is already ready. The result? Google PageSpeed scores consistently above 90/100.

sections.title: Security: less risk, more peace of mind
paragraphs: WordPress represents 43% of the global web, making it the #1 target for hackers. Each plugin, each theme is a potential attack vector. In 2025, more than 4,000 WordPress vulnerabilities were identified.
A custom Next.js site has a drastically reduced attack surface: no exposed database, no publicly accessible admin panel, no vulnerable third-party plugins. Your site is inherently more secure.

sections.title: SEO: a structural advantage
paragraphs: Google favors fast, lightweight, and well-structured sites. A Next.js site generates perfect semantic HTML, with full control over meta tags, structured data, and URL structure.
Unlike WordPress where SEO depends on plugins (Yoast, RankMath) that add weight and complexity, SEO optimization is native in a custom site. Each page is created with SEO in mind.

sections.title: Design: your identity, not a template
paragraphs: With WordPress, even with a premium theme at $70, your site will look like thousands of others. Customizations are limited by the page builder, and going beyond the template framework quickly becomes a technical nightmare.
A custom site is designed pixel by pixel for your visual identity. Every interaction, every animation, every detail is designed to reflect your brand and offer a unique experience to your visitors.

sections.title: Maintenance: long-term peace of mind
paragraphs: A WordPress site requires regular maintenance: WordPress updates, plugin updates (often 15-30 plugins), theme updates, security checks. Each update carries a risk of breaking something.
A Next.js site has no dependencies to update on the production side. It is deployed as a set of static files on a CDN. No server to maintain, no plugins to monitor: your site runs autonomously.

whenWordpressOk.title: When WordPress may be suitable
whenWordpressOk.subtitle: To be honest, here are the cases where WordPress remains an acceptable option.
cases: Temporary or event site on a very small budget
Project requiring hundreds of simultaneous contributors
Prototype or MVP to quickly validate an idea
whenWordpressOk.disclaimer: However, if your site is a real business tool that must reflect your professional activity, attract clients via Google and offer a smooth experience, a custom site will always be the best investment.

cta.title: Ready for a site that reflects you?
cta.description: Switch to custom and offer your business a performing, secure, and perfectly optimized website. First exchange free and without commitment.
